terms.title: 使用条款
terms.lastUpdated: 最后更新：2026 年 4 月
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Fun Facts! Trivia. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Fun Facts! Trivia ("Service", "App", "we", "us", or "our"), a trivia game operated by Zuki Apps ("Company"). By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Fun Facts! Trivia is a mobile trivia application. The Service includes: multiple-choice questions across themed categories, difficulty levels, timed play, local statistics, optional Game Center / Play Games features, advertising, and optional in-app purchases (e.g. ad removal).
items: Offline play with locally stored content
Ads and optional ad removal via in-app purchase
Leaderboards and achievements where platform services are available

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

privacy.title: 隐私政策
privacy.lastUpdated: 最后更新：2026 年 4 月

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: Fun Facts! Trivia collects minimal information necessary to provide the service. Game progress, preferences, and statistics may be stored locally on your device. We collect information you provide when you contact support. If you use Game Center, Play Games, ads, or analytics, additional data may be processed as described in your platform and ad provider settings.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information to provide, maintain, and improve the app, respond to support requests, and comply with legal obligations. Advertising partners may use identifiers to deliver and measure ads in accordance with their policies.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal information. Data may be shared with platform providers (Apple, Google) for purchases, Game Center / Play Games, and crash reporting when those features are enabled, subject to their policies.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement reasonable measures to protect information. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure; use the app at your own discretion.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You can stop using the app, clear local data in settings where available, or uninstall the app. For platform-held data, use Apple or Google account tools. Contact us for questions about this Policy.

section6.title: 6. Advertising and Children
section6.content: The app may display third-party ads. Parents should review store age ratings and device parental controls. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children in violation of applicable law.

section7.title: 7. Contact Us
section7.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

privacy.title: 隐私政策
privacy.description: 我们如何保护您的数据

q1.question: 什么是 Fun Facts! Trivia？
q1.answer: 八个类别的手机选择题问答。可选难度、限时轮次、连击与统计。使用 Flutter 构建的 iOS/Android 应用。

q2.question: 可以离线玩吗？
q2.answer: 可以。题目内置在应用中。广告、购买、Game Center/Play Games 或更新可能需要网络。

q3.question: 如何去除广告？
q3.answer: 可选的一次性内购可去除广告。通过 Apple 或 Google 付款；重新安装时请在商店或应用内恢复购买。

q4.question: 有排行榜吗？
q4.answer: 在支持的设备上，登录后可使用 Game Center 与 Play Games 的排行榜与成就。

q5.question: 支持哪些语言？
q5.answer: 界面已本地化为多种语言与地区变体。可在设置中更改。

q6.question: 如何获取帮助？
q6.answer: 邮箱：zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com。网站提供隐私政策与使用条款。

additionalHelp.title: 还需要帮助？
additionalHelp.description: 若未找到答案或有技术问题，请联系我们。通常在 24–48 小时内回复。

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about features, privacy, and billing.

items.question: What is Fun Facts! Trivia?
items.answer: A free mobile trivia game by Zuki Apps. Each round has 10 timed multiple-choice questions across eight fact categories, with scoring, streaks, stats, and optional leaderboards.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes. The app is free to download and play. Optional Premium removes ads with a one-time purchase (not a subscription).

items.question: iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes — available on the App Store and Google Play.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No account is required to play. Game Center (iOS) or Google Play Games (Android) is only needed for leaderboards and achievements.

items.question: What categories are available?
items.answer: Science & Nature · History & Culture · Geography & World · Odd Facts & Records · Movies & Film · Amazing Facts · Sports & Games · World Records.

items.question: What are the difficulty levels?
items.answer: - Easy — 20 seconds per question - Medium — 15 seconds - Hard — 12 seconds Harder modes increase score multipliers.

items.question: How does scoring work?
items.answer: Points come from base value × difficulty, plus time bonus, plus streak bonus (up to +50%), plus a +150 perfect-round bonus if you get 10/10. See the [user manual](../how-to/user_manual.md) for details.

items.question: What happens when time runs out?
items.answer: The question counts as incorrect and your streak resets.

items.question: Are questions the same every time?
items.answer: Questions are drawn from a large bundled bank (~395 per language) and shuffled so rounds feel fresh.

items.question: Can I play offline?
items.answer: Yes. Questions are stored in the app. Leaderboards, ads, and purchases need internet.

items.question: Which languages are supported?
items.answer: Arabic, German, English, Spanish, French, Hebrew, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Chinese (with regional variants where available).

items.title: 1. Protect your streak
items.description: Each correct answer in a row adds +10% to that answer’s score (max 5 → +50%). One wrong answer resets to zero. On harder questions, a streak is worth more than a risky guess.

items.title: 2. Don’t wait until the last second
items.description: Time bonus kicks in when you still have at least half the timer left. Tap confidently once you’re reasonably sure — dragging to 1 second leaves points on the table.

items.title: 3. Chase the perfect round
items.description: All 10 correct = +150 bonus on top of everything else. On Easy, learn the question style first; then push Medium or Hard for higher multipliers.

items.title: 4. Match difficulty to your goal
items.description: Easy — learn categories, build streak muscle memory - Medium — best balance for leaderboard pushes - Hard — ×2.0 multiplier; achievements like Hard Mode Win reward this ---

items.title: 5. Warm up with mixed Play
items.description: Home → Play mixes all categories. Great when you don’t know what you’re in the mood for and want variety.

items.title: 6. Grind weak categories
items.description: Check Stats for categories with lower accuracy. Dedicated category rounds improve both knowledge and mastery achievements.

items.title: 7. Read explanations
items.description: After answering, read the fact blurb when shown — many questions reuse themes or similar wording later.

items.title: 8. Use process of elimination
items.description: Four options every time. Cross off two obviously wrong choices before the timer gets tight. ---
